query: I run two n8n instances through n8n-mcp — a prod and a staging. I want you to build a small webhook-to-Slack workflow on STAGING, not prod. Please create it on the right one.
expected_behavior: Activate n8n-multi-instance skill (the n8n_instances tool is available / user named multiple instances)
Call n8n_instances({mode:"list"}) first to see available names and which is current/default
Switch to staging with n8n_instances({mode:"switch", name:"staging"}) BEFORE creating anything
Do the switch in its own turn — not batched in the same parallel tool-call block as the create — and confirm current.name == 'staging' from the returned { previous, current }
Only then create the workflow, so it lands on staging rather than the default (prod)
Not assume a per-call instance argument exists — targeting only changes via switch
Hand off the actual workflow build to n8n-workflow-patterns / n8n-mcp-tools-expert once the instance is correctly targeted
notes: Core flow: discover -> switch by name (own turn) -> verify current -> operate. The create must follow a confirmed switch, because every tool routes to the currently-selected instance and the default here is prod.
